signals.title: An OpenAI model has disproved a central conjecture in discrete geometry
signals.summary: An OpenAI model solved the 80-year-old unit distance problem, disproving a major conjecture in discrete geometry and marking a milestone in AI-driven mathematics.
signals.aiSummary: OpenAI模型解决80年数学难题，标志着AI在数学研究领域的重大突破

signals.title: Introducing OpenAI for Singapore
signals.summary: OpenAI for Singapore launches a multi-year AI partnership to expand deployment, build local talent, and support businesses and public services with AI.
signals.aiSummary: OpenAI在新加坡启动多年AI合作计划，推动本地AI部署、人才培养和商业应用

signals.title: Advancing content provenance for a safer, more transparent AI ecosystem
signals.summary: OpenAI advances AI content provenance with Content Credentials, SynthID, and a verification tool to help people identify and trust AI-generated media.
signals.aiSummary: OpenAI推出内容溯源技术，通过内容凭证和验证工具帮助识别AI生成媒体，提升AI生态透明度

signals.title: OpenAI and Dell partner to bring Codex to hybrid and on-premise enterprise environments
signals.summary: OpenAI and Dell partner to bring Codex to hybrid and on-premise environments, helping enterprises deploy AI coding agents securely across data and workflows.
signals.aiSummary: OpenAI与戴尔合作将Codex部署到企业混合云和本地环境，推动AI编程助手在企业级应用

signals.title: Databricks brings GPT-5.5 to enterprise agent workflows
signals.summary: Databricks uses GPT-5.5 for enterprise agent workflows after the model set a new state of the art on the OfficeQA Pro benchmark.
signals.aiSummary: Databricks将GPT-5.5集成到企业智能体工作流，在办公场景基准测试中创新高

signals.title: A new personal finance experience in ChatGPT
signals.summary: Preview a new personal finance experience in ChatGPT for Pro users in the U.S. Securely connect your financial accounts and get AI-powered insights and guidance grounded in your financial context, goals, and priorities.
signals.aiSummary: ChatGPT推出个人财务管理功能，Pro用户可连接银行账户获得AI财务建议，扩展AI应用场景
